English: Total seconds a player was crowd-controlled.
Total seconds a player applied crowd-control effect on other players.
Indonesian: Total detik player melakukan efek crowd-controt kepada player lain.

English: Total damage a player amplified through effects like Holycross, Swordcross, etc.
Indonesian: Total damage player diperkuat oleh efek seperti Holycross, Swordcross, dll.

English: Total damage a player mitigated through effects like Damage Redirection, etc.
Indonesian: Total damage yang dimitigasi melalui efek seperti Damage Redirection, dll.
